name: File Manager
description: High-performance file explorer to manage server directories and files.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: First versioned AppStore build; mobile-friendly layout and file operations (rename, cut, copy) aligned with current CoPanel.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Ban dong goi AppStore co phien ban; giao dien mobile va thao tac file (doi ten, cat, copy) dong bo ma nguon CoPanel hien tai.

name: Web Manager
description: Nginx and Apache vhosts, LEMP/LAMP stack bootstrap, PHP-FPM overview, and smart DB admin tools.
changelog_en: v1.1.1: Remove the per-site PHP configuration tab from Web Manager; PHP tuning remains in PHP Manager. Other stack and vhost behavior unchanged.
changelog_vi: v1.1.1: Go tab cau hinh PHP theo tung site trong Web Manager; dieu chinh PHP tap trung o PHP Manager. Hanh vi vhost/stack khac giu nguyen.

name: Site Wizard
description: Provision a complete website (Nginx + DB + SSL) end-to-end in one flow.
changelog_en: v1.0.0: First AppStore release of the Site Wizard module (guided stack + vhost + database + SSL provisioning).
changelog_vi: v1.0.0: Phat hanh AppStore lan dau cho module Site Wizard (luong huong dan stack + vhost + database + SSL).

name: Database Manager
changelog_en: v1.0.4: Restore MySQL/MariaDB list action to download gzip dumps (.sql.gz) via GET /dump-gzip (button was missing in 1.0.3 frontend). v1.0.3: size reporting and backend dump-gzip.
changelog_vi: v1.0.4: Khoi phuc nut tai ban dump .sql.gz tren danh sach MySQL/MariaDB (frontend 1.0.3 thieu). v1.0.3: hien thi dung luong va API dump-gzip phia backend.

name: Docker Manager
description: Manage containers, images, and stacks seamlessly.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Major Docker Manager upgrade with service-based architecture, full Docker ops APIs (containers/images/networks/volumes), complete compose lifecycle endpoints, hybrid auto-scan plus managed stacks, and stronger validation/timeouts.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Nang cap lon Docker Manager voi kien truc tach service, day du API van hanh Docker (containers/images/networks/volumes), endpoint compose lifecycle hoan chinh, mo hinh hybrid auto-scan ket hop managed stacks, cung co validate va timeout.

name: SSL Manager
changelog_en: v1.0.2: Refactor SSL router error handling and harden frontend request headers to avoid sending invalid Bearer tokens.
changelog_vi: v1.0.2: Refactor xu ly loi trong SSL router va cung co header request frontend de tranh gui Bearer token khong hop le.

name: PHP Manager
description: Control local PHP versions and php.ini configurations.
changelog_en: v1.0.3: Detect installed PHP streams via dpkg Status (install ok installed) instead of orphan /etc/php/*/php.ini after remove; purge APT packages with config (deinstall ok config-files), second-pass grep purge for phpX.Y* and libapache2-mod-phpX.Y, post-check dpkg/binary before success; fixes false "still installed" after uninstall.
changelog_vi: v1.0.3: Nhan dien phien ban PHP qua trang thai dpkg (install ok installed), khong con dua vao file php.ini sot sau remove; purge goi APT kem cau hinh (deinstall ok config-files), vong hai purge theo ten phpX.Y* va libapache2-mod-phpX.Y, kiem tra lai dpkg/binary truoc khi bao thanh cong; sua loi van hien thi da cai sau khi go.

name: Terminal
description: Execute system commands securely in the browser.
changelog_en: v1.0.3: Auto-save custom snippets on add/remove (PUT /snippets); more built-ins (daemon-reload, nginx, UFW, Fail2Ban). v1.0.2: JSON snippet API.
changelog_vi: v1.0.3: Tu dong luu snippet khi them/xoa; them nhieu lenh co san (daemon-reload, nginx, UFW, Fail2Ban). v1.0.2: API snippet JSON.

name: Backup Manager
description: Zero-CLI cloud backup manager powered by rclone. Includes guided Google OAuth onboarding, profile-based remote setup, cron scheduling, real-time sync watchdog, and live progress streaming.
changelog_en: v1.2.8: MySQL uploads now target remote_path/<dump>.sql.gz so a configured path ending in .sql no longer renames the object to .sql; gzip binary resolved via PATH or /usr/bin/gzip. v1.2.7: gzip dump before rclone.
changelog_vi: v1.2.8: Upload MySQL dat dich den remote_path/<file>.sql.gz — neu truoc day cau hinh ket thuc bang .sql thi rclone khong con doi ten thanh .sql nua; tim gzip qua PATH hoac /usr/bin/gzip. v1.2.7: nen gzip truoc khi rclone.

name: System Monitor
description: Real-time visibility into CPU, memory, and disk usage.
changelog_en: v1.1.2: Richer system header — CPU model (Linux /proc/cpuinfo, macOS sysctl), architecture, total RAM, aggregated disk totals by device (tmpfs etc. excluded); UI shows capacity breakdown. v1.1.1: process detail hardening.
changelog_vi: v1.1.2: Thong tin hero day hon — ten CPU, kien truc, tong RAM, tong dung luong o dia (gop theo thiet bi, bo qua tmpfs); hien chi tiet dung luong. v1.1.1: cung co chi tiet PID.

name: Firewall
description: Visual dashboard for UFW firewall rules and Fail2Ban IDS with correct jail / banned-IP display.
changelog_en: v1.0.5: Fix Fail2Ban active-state detection with robust service/client fallbacks and add one-click enable action from the Firewall UI when Fail2Ban is installed but inactive.
changelog_vi: v1.0.5: Sua nhan dien trang thai hoat dong Fail2Ban on dinh hon (fallback service/client) va bo sung nut bat nhanh trong giao dien Firewall khi Fail2Ban da cai nhung dang inactive.

name: DNS Manager
description: Manage DNS zones and records using local storage or BIND backend.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Improve reliability by using collision-resistant zone/record IDs and add frontend error handling for delete zone/record actions.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Tang do on dinh bang ID zone/record chong trung va bo sung xu ly loi tren frontend khi xoa zone/record.

name: Cron Manager
description: Manage recurring task schedules with visual cron builder and command execution.
changelog_en: v1.0.4: Add pause/start controls for managed cron jobs with DB-backed is_active state and crontab sync that only deploys active jobs.
changelog_vi: v1.0.4: Bo sung nut pause/start cho cron job managed voi trang thai is_active luu trong DB va dong bo crontab chi trien khai job dang active.

name: Package Manager
description: Comprehensive Software Center for installing Runtimes, Utilities, and System Packages.
changelog_en: v1.0.2: Execute real install/start/stop/restart/remove actions through package manager and systemctl, surface action errors to UI, and add explicit phpMyAdmin access path/open button after install.
changelog_vi: v1.0.2: Thuc thi that cac thao tac install/start/stop/restart/remove qua package manager va systemctl, hien thi loi thao tac tren giao dien, va bo sung duong dan/nut mo phpMyAdmin ro rang sau khi cai.

name: Platform
description: Cross-cutting platform APIs for jobs, notifications, audit logs, and real-time events.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Optimize platform UI runtime by suppressing no-op store updates and automatically tearing down idle SSE connections.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Toi uu runtime UI platform bang cach bo qua cap nhat store khong doi du lieu va tu dong dong ket noi SSE khi khong con listener.

name: Authentication
description: JWT authentication and user/permission management APIs for CoPanel.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Refactor auth router internals to reuse a single user serializer and remove repeated inline imports without changing API behavior.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Refactor noi bo auth router de dung chung ham serialize user va bo import lap lai trong ham, khong thay doi hanh vi API.

name: AppStore Manager
description: Add, remove, and upgrade third-party modules seamlessly.
changelog_en: v1.0.13: Keep no-restart install flow to avoid logout while restoring automatic page refresh after successful build so newly installed modules appear immediately.
changelog_vi: v1.0.13: Giu co che cai dat khong restart de tranh dang xuat, dong thoi khoi phuc tu dong refresh trang sau build thanh cong de module moi hien ngay.
